business.name: Elite Landscape, LLC
business.tagline: Transforming coastal yards into outdoor sanctuaries

hero.headline: From Sand & Weeds to *Something Beautiful*
hero.subheadline: Luis and his crew know exactly what grows here — and what doesn't. Your neighbors on Carolina Beach already know the difference.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Project Gets the Full Treatment
services_section.subheading: From nightmare yards to custom patios — we handle what coastal living throws at your property

services.title: Yard Cleanup & Restoration
services.description: Turn overgrown disasters into clean slates. We tackle the heavy brush, weeds, and years of neglect that make yards feel like forests.

services.title: Custom Patio Extensions
services.description: Expand that plain concrete slab into something worth spending time on. Built solid, designed to complement your home.

services.title: Complete Landscaping Design
services.description: From sand lots to full outdoor spaces. We know what thrives in coastal conditions and what's just going to die.

services.title: Mulching & Ground Cover
services.description: The finishing touch that makes everything look intentional. Proper mulching that actually stays put through coastal weather.

about.heading: Luis & His Team Know Wilmington Yards
about.body: We've been turning coastal North Carolina properties into spaces people actually want to spend time in. From Carolina Beach to downtown Wilmington, we understand what works in sandy soil, salt air, and unpredictable weather. When your yard feels like a lost cause, we see the potential.

reviews.name: Crystal C.
reviews.text: Luis brought so much knowledge and creativity to our project. He walked us through options we didn't even know existed.

reviews.name: Dawn H.
reviews.text: Our yard was an absolute nightmare — felt like living in a forest. They cleaned everything up in a day and a half. Incredible transformation.

reviews.name: Sandy U.
reviews.text: The back patio they built is beautiful. Professional, knowledgeable, and super nice. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Barbara V.
reviews.text: They turned our yard of sand and weeds into something beautiful. Timely, communicative, and worked incredibly hard.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Cape Fear Coast
service_areas.subheading: From beachfront to downtown — we know these neighborhoods

cta.heading: Ready to Love Your Yard Again?
cta.body: Free estimates on every project. We'll walk your property and show you exactly what's possible — no pressure, just honest advice from people who know this area.
